item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-7381 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-7381 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Plack::Middleware::XSendfile versions through 1.0053 for Perl can allow client-controlled path rewriting. Plack::Middleware::XSendfile allows the variation setting (sendfile type) to be set by the client via the X-Sendfile-Type header, if it is not considered in the middleware constructor or the Plack environment. A malicious client can set the X-Sendfile-Type header to "X-Accel-Redirect" to services running behind n...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7381

item.title: [Segurança] Critical cPanel and WHM bug exploited as a zero-day, PoC now available
item.description:
🚨 Critical cPanel and WHM bug exploited as a zero-day, PoC now available
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The critical CVE-2026-41940 authentication bypass vulnerability in cPanel, WHM, and WP Squared is being actively exploited in the wild and has been leveraged in attempts since late February.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-cpanel-and-whm-bug-exploited-as-a-zero-day-poc-now-available/

item.title: [Segurança] New Linux 'Copy Fail' Vulnerability Enables Root Access on Major Distributions
item.description:
🚨 New Linux 'Copy Fail' Vulnerability Enables Root Access on Major Distributions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a Linux local privilege escalation (LPE) flaw that could allow an unprivileged local user to obtain root. The high-severity vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-31431 (CVSS score: 7.8) has been codenamed Copy Fail by Xint.io and Theori. "An unprivileged local user can write four controlled bytes into the page cache of any readable file on a Linux
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/new-linux-copy-fail-vulnerability.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CISA, Microsoft warn of active exploitation of Windows Shell vulnerability (CVE-2026-32202) - Help Net Security
item.description:
🚨 CISA, Microsoft warn of active exploitation of Windows Shell vulnerability (CVE-2026-32202) - Help Net Security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-32202 associada a Windows Server. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxORWNSeVlrYU85RFdWaURTdzVhT2VVa0NGcW1BOGlNd2RMZ0ozV1djTEkwUlV2STlMMGlfYmljWWZRa3pRMl9GbGJzVTllZWF5TE94YnFPa3ZfU2plbzROdW4ydU9Ibk1ZOGFTZDVqMTloZ3dFMUxvbnFBaEJxVU41TmF3?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8185-2: Linux kernel (Low Latency NVIDIA) vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8185-2: Linux kernel (Low Latency NVIDIA) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Josh Eads, Kristoffer Janke, Eduardo Vela Nava, Tavis Ormandy, and Matteo Rizzo discovered that some AMD Zen processors did not properly verify the signature of CPU microcode. A privileged attacker could possibly use this issue to cause load malicious CPU microcode causing loss of integrity and confidentiality. (CVE-2024-36347) Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly us...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8185-2

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-25852 - Acronis
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-25852 - Acronis
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Acronis
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.7
Resumo:
Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.93212.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-25852

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-41499 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-41499 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Wazuh is a free and open source platform used for threat prevention, detection, and response. From version 4.0.0 to before version 4.14.4, multiple heap-based out-of-bounds WRITE vulnerabilities exist in parse_uname_string() (remoted_op.c). This function processes OS identification data from agents and contains a dangerous code pattern that appears in 4 locations within the same function: writing to strlen(ptr) - 1 w...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41499

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-4019 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4019 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Complianz – GDPR/CCPA Cookie Consent plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized data access in all versions up to, and including, 7.4.5 This is due to the REST API endpoint at /wp-json/complianz/v1/consent-area/{post_id}/{block_id} using __return_true as the permission_callback, allowing any unauthenticated user to access it. The cmplz_rest_consented_content() function retrieves a post by ID via get_post(...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4019

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-33467 - Elastic
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-33467 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.9
Resumo:
Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature (CWE-347) in Elastic Package Registry could allow an attacker positioned to intercept network traffic, or to otherwise influence the contents served to a self-hosted registry, to substitute a tampered package without the integrity check failing closed.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33467

item.title: [Segurança] New Linux ‘Copy Fail’ flaw gives hackers root on major distros
item.description:
💣 New Linux ‘Copy Fail’ flaw gives hackers root on major distros
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
An exploit has been published for a local privilege escalation vulnerability dubbed "Copy Fail" that impacts Linux kernels released since 2017, allowing an unprivileged local attacker to gain root permissions.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-linux-copy-fail-flaw-gives-hackers-root-on-major-distros/

item.title: [Segurança] cPanel, WHM emergency update fixes critical auth bypass bug
item.description:
💣 cPanel, WHM emergency update fixes critical auth bypass bug
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical vulnerability affecting all but the latest versions of cPanel and the WebHost Manager (WHM) dashboard could be exploited to obtain access to the control panel without authentication.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cpanel-whm-emergency-update-fixes-critical-auth-bypass-bug/

item.title: [Segurança] SonicWall Urges Immediate Patching of Firewall Vulnerabilities
item.description:
💣 SonicWall Urges Immediate Patching of Firewall Vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: SecurityWeek
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The bugs could be exploited to bypass security controls, access restricted services, and crash firewalls.
Link: https://www.securityweek.com/sonicwall-urges-immediate-patching-of-firewall-vulnerabilities/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Replicating VMware vSphere Configuration Profile Desired State
item.description:
📰 Replicating VMware vSphere Configuration Profile Desired State
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
vSphere Configuration Profiles allows VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) administrators to manage the ESX host configuration at a cluster level. In this article, we discuss how to easily replicate configuration from one cluster to another cluster. Note: Screenshots and steps described are based on vSphere 9.0.2. Certain UI elements or verbiage may differ in earlier or …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/29/replicating-vsphere-configuration-profile-desired-state/

item.title: [Segurança] Google Fixes CVSS 10 Gemini CLI CI RCE and Cursor Flaws Enable Code Execution
item.description:
📰 Google Fixes CVSS 10 Gemini CLI CI RCE and Cursor Flaws Enable Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Google has addressed a maximum severity security flaw in Gemini CLI -- the "@google/gemini-cli" npm package and the "google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli" GitHub Actions workflow -- that could have allowed attackers to execute arbitrary commands on host systems. "The vulnerability allowed an unprivileged external attacker to force their own malicious content to load as Gemini configuration,"
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/google-fixes-cvss-10-gemini-cli-ci-rce.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] From Infrastructure to Agents: A Hands-On Guide to Secure Private AI with Broadcom – Part 2
item.description:
📰 From Infrastructure to Agents: A Hands-On Guide to Secure Private AI with Broadcom – Part 2
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Part 2 of 4: Securing GPU-Accelerated AI Workloads with VMware vDefend on VMware Private AI Foundation with NVIDIA In Part 1 of this series, we laid the hardware and network groundwork for a secure Private AI architecture. We walked through how to enforce deep GPU tenancy, physically and logically isolating compute resources from the organizational …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/30/guide-to-secure-private-ai-with-broadcom-part-2/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Whole-of-state cyber defense: How AI-driven security helps US states protect what matters most
item.description:
📰 Whole-of-state cyber defense: How AI-driven security helps US states protect what matters most
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
State and local governments in the United States face growing cyber threats but uneven security resources across agencies. A whole-of-state security model enables shared visibility, coordination, and resilience without sacrificing data sovereignty.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/whole-of-state-cyber-defense

item.title: [Infraestrutura] The New Frontier: Leading the Cloud-Native Evolution
item.description:
📰 The New Frontier: Leading the Cloud-Native Evolution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The cloud-native transformation is no longer a distant projection; it is at the very heart of modern enterprise technology. Across the globe, large-scale enterprises are grappling with how to scale modern applications while maintaining mission-critical compliance. In the Asia-Pacific-Japan (APJ) region specifically, this challenge is compounded by a diverse regulatory landscape and soaring data demands.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/30/the-new-frontier-leading-the-cloud-native-evolution/
